steps.title: Set up the equation
steps.content:
The total cost is \$62.00: the pass (\$19.50) plus 10 identical stickers. If $s$ is the cost of one sticker:
$$19.50 + 10s = 62.00$$

steps.title: Solve for the cost per sticker
steps.content: Subtract 19.50 from both sides: $$10s = 62.00 - 19.50 = 42.50$$ Divide both sides by 10: $$s = \frac{42.50}{10} = 4.25$$ That matches choice B — B is correct.
